rulings.Case Title: KATHY A. PIPPINS VS. ESTATE OF CHRISTINE EILEEN YOUNG, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Buyers Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside The Sale Of Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday April 14, 2016, line 1. OTHER MARK FREYMAN, DAWN FREYMAN Buyers Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside The Sale Of Real Property Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH CONNELLY VS. ELIZABETH MAGUIRE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday April 14, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH MAGUIRE, DANIEL BORNSTEIN, BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN, AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to May 16, 2016. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than April 29, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of reply opposition to department 501 no later than April 29, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JUN ZHI LI VS. RESIDENT MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday April 14, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT WESTERN MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY, WESTERN MUTUAL INSURANCE GROUP, RESIDENCE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint alleges fraud and negligent misrepresentation cause of action with requisite particularity, at least as to the post-loss events. Additionally, an insurer can be liable for negligent misrepresentation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. CHAD POTTER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday April 14, 2016, line 4. PLAINTIFF 1049 MARKET STREET LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint DENIED on procedural grounds because Plaintiff failed to comply with CRC, Rule 3.1324(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. CHAD POTTER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday April 14, 2016, line 4. PLAINTIFF 1049 MARKET STREET LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL GRANTED. Trial will be set to October 17, 2016. All discovery deadlines will follow the new trial date as if it were the original trial date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. CHAD POTTER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday April 14, 2016, line 4. Defendant's Motion For Summary Judgment treated as a judgment on the pleadings. Judgment on the pleadings is GRANTED and Plaintiff is given leave to amend its complaint in regards to the first cause of action for quantum meruit. = (501/REQ)
